provisions.content: The form of application for a Certificate of Status Investment under section 6 of the Act shall be as set out in Annex A hereto.

The form of Certificate of Status Investment under section 7 of the Act shall be as set out in Annex B hereto. ANNEXES A & B FORMS [In the Government Gazette , the “Determination of minimum value of eligible investment: Foreign Investment Act, 1990” appears between Annex A and Annex B of GN 120/1992. This appears to be a lay-out error. This determination actually forms GN 121/1992 . It has accordingly been deleted from the regulations.] [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced.] History of this document 15 November 2017 this version Consolidation 14 September 1992 Published in Government Gazette 477 Commenced Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Facebook Page Visit our Twitter/X profile About NamibLII NamibLII is a project of the Law Reform and Development Commission managed by the Directorate: Law Reform of the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Namibia. In terms of the Law Reform and Development Commission Act, 1991 (Act No. 29 of 1991), the Commission is mandated to consolidate or codify any branch of the law or to introduce other measures aimed at making the law more readily accessible. NamibLII is the embodiment of this mandate making annotated statutes, judgments, and gazettes available in a user-friendly format.
